name: Butter Wafers
recipeInstructions: Sift the flour and sugar together into a mixing bowl. Add the butter and work it in with the tips of your fingers or a pastry blender until combined. Combine the egg, milk, and vanilla in a separate bowl, then stir into the flour mixture. Mix well to form a dough. Shape into 1/2 inch balls. If the dough seems too soft, refrigerate until the desired consistency is reached before shaping. Place the balls about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet. Flatten each ball to 1/16 inch thickness using the bottom of a glass covered with a damp cloth. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 6-8 minutes, or until slightly browned around the edges. Do not overbake. Remove immediately to a wire rack to cool. Store in a tightly covered container.
